name: Cheese Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk and salt in a saucepan over medium heat until hot.
2. Scald the mixture, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and sprinkle in Cream of Rice. Cook for 1 minute, stirring continuously.
4. Cover and let stand for 4 minutes.
5. Add butter and cheese; stir until melted.
6. Beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until stiff but not dry.
7. Beat egg yolks separately until lemon-colored.
8. Gradually blend warm rice mixture into the yolk mixture.
9. Gently fold in about one-third of the beaten egg whites, then add the remainder.
10. Pour batter into an unbuttered souffle dish or 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
11. If using, lightly butter the dish and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
12. Sprinkle top lightly with Parmesan.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until puffed and golden brown, about 40 minutes.
14. Serve immediately.
